no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction describes the bug (missing backward-compatibility alias) and expected behavior (import works, deprecation warning, delegation) but does not specify exact implementation details like line numbers to change, exact warning text, or the specific code pattern to use.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: The tests check behavioral properties: (1) check_model_inputs is importable, (2) it delegates to merge_with_config_defaults producing identical results, (3) a deprecation/rename warning is emitted. Alternative implementations (e.g., using functools.wraps, using warnings.warn vs logger.warning, different warning text containing the keywords) would all pass. The deprecation test checks for any of several keywords in combined log+warning output.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import and call check_model_inputs as a decorator, instantiate model classes, invoke forward methods, and check return values. The deprecation test runs a subprocess that actually executes the code. No test merely greps source text.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub `check_model_inputs = lambda func: func` would fail test_decorator_delegates_to_merge_with_config_defaults because calling forward() without arguments would return None for use_cache instead of True (the config default). The merge_with_config_defaults logic fills in config defaults, so the alias must actually delegate. A no-op stub also wouldn't emit the required deprecation warning.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction requires: (1) importing check_model_inputs works — tested by multiple tests, (2) deprecation warning is emitted — tested by test_deprecation_warning_emitted, (3) delegation to merge_with_config_defaults — tested by test_decorator_delegates_to_merge_with_config_defaults. All stated behaviors are covered.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with clear section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived), descriptive function names, and docstrings explaining what each test verifies.
